examples: In coeducational schools, girls are often expected to succeed only in humanities or the arts.
The college has been coeducational since 1971.
Girls who graduate from single-sex schools are three times more likely to become engineers than those who attend coeducational schools.
Centenary College of Louisiana is a four-year, coeducational, private liberal arts college located in Shreveport, Louisiana.
Fisk University is a four-year, coeducational, private liberal arts university located in Nashville, Tennessee.
